monochrome_logs.help_text: Should logs appear in plain ASCII

manifest.help_text: Input manifest CSV with (required) header line 'ID,R1,R2', containing per sample paths to .fastq.gz files

temp_storage.help_text: Provide the temporary storage directory to be used during runtime. (Required)

themisto_index.help_text: Path to a pre-built Themisto index including the index prefix. Skips indexing if provided.

kmer_size.help_text: K-mer size to use for index and pseudoalignment (21|31|51). If providing an index ensure k-mer size is identical.

ref_groups.help_text: Provide the grouped references as a text file. Skips clustering if provided.

skip_clustering.help_text: Use ungrouped references in mSWEEP (not recommended). If ref_groups is provided clustering is skipped regardless of this flag.

get_assignments.help_text: Output the read assignment table used by mGEMS for binning.
